name: PAX Small Stash Jar
summary: PAX Small Stash Jar — a storage accessory for patients keeping prescribed flower fresh.
description: Enhance your storage system with our recently added airtight and sturdy aluminium stash jar that effectively preserves and shields your goods from sunlight, thanks to its odour-proof design. Capacity : Holds up to ¼ oz of dry herb Dimensions : 2.5”L x 2.5”W x 1.9”H / 6.4 x 6.4 x 4.9 cm Keeps prescribed flower at its best for longer.

specs.label: Chamber
specs.value: Holds up to ¼ oz of dry herb
